title: Battle of Bomis Koori IV
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Otheruses|Battle of Bomis Koori}} {{Battle |prev=[[Mission to Vjun (Clone Wars)|Mission to Vjun]]{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=196444&start=285#10095419|thread=EU Leadup to Revenge of the Sith|user=[[Leland Chee|Tasty Taste]]|date=2005-03-29|time=10:49 AM}}''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' |conc= |next=[[Unidentified space battle (Saesee Tiin)|Space battle involving Saesee Tiin]]{{CW|22}} |image=[[File:Battle_of_Bomis_Korri_IV.jpg]] |name=Battle of Bomis Koori IV |conflict=[[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] ([[Yag'Dhul theater]] of the [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|Outer Rim Sieges]])''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |date=[[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' moves ''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'' to [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]] and also compresses the events of the ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'' series up until [[Chapter 21 (Star Wars: Clone Wars)|Chapter 21]] to the first four weeks of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. As [[Chapter 22 (Star Wars: Clone Wars)|Chapter 22]] is the first episode where Anakin is a full Jedi Knight, and [[Leland Chee]] has stated that the battle at [[Bomis Koori IV]] occurs after ''Yoda: Dark Rendezvous'', the battle must also fall in 19 BBY. |place=[[Bomis Koori IV]] |result=*[[Oro Dassyne's Bomis Koori IV fort|Oro Dassyne's fort]] infiltrated; [[Ray shield/Legends|protective shield]] deactivated{{DB|character|generaldassyne|Dassyne, General Oro}} *[[Oro Dassyne/Legends|Dassyne]] [[Death/Legends|killed]] following the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic's]] attack on his fort |side1=*Galactic Republic *[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] |side2=[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1=*[[High Jedi General/Legends|High General]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] *[[Jedi General/Legends|General]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] |commanders2=[[General/Legends|General]] Oro Dassyne† |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*2 [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] *[[Aggressive ReConnaissance-170 starfighter/Legends|ARC-170 starfighters]] *At least 8 [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyers]] |forces2=*1 [[Koorivar Fusiliers/Legends|Koorivar Fusiliers]] general *[[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]]s *[[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droids]] |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=None |casual2=*Oro Dassyne *Many [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|I wonder how many they'll send. We've got so much firepower in here, these walls are ray-shielded. They can't take this fort. It'll probably be, uh, fifty Jedi. They'll need at least that many. Huh, maybe a hundred Jedi! They'll never take this base with less. Ha, they'll need an army of Jedi!|Oro Dassyne|audio=OroDassyne1-CW22.flac|}} In the [[19 BBY/Legends|final year]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], a '''battle''' took place on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bomis Koori IV]]. As a [[Corporate Alliance/Legends|Corporate Alliance]]–controlled world, Bomis Koori IV was overseen by Alliance member and [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederate]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Oro Dassyne/Legends|Oro Dassyne]], who maintained a [[Ray shield/Legends|ray shielded]] [[Oro Dassyne's Bomis Koori IV fort|fort]] on the planet. The [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] dispatched a [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] of eight [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyers]], led by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], to invade the planet. Dassyne, expecting a large [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] force to attack his ordnance-filled fort, only witnessed a number of [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] closing in on his location. After [[Aggressive ReConnaissance-170 starfighter/Legends|ARC-170 starfighters]] departed the [[Star/Legends|Star]] [[Destroyer/Legends|Destroyers]] and began firing on Dassyne's forces, Skywalker and Kenobi infiltrated the fort and deactivated its protective ray shield, rendering it vulnerable to an attack. The Republic fleet subsequently concentrated its firepower on the facility, and Dassyne was [[Death/Legends|killed]] during the ensuing [[Lightfight|firefight]]. ==Prelude== The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bomis Koori IV]] was important to the [[Corporate Alliance/Legends|Corporate Alliance's]] defense of surrounding [[Star system/Legends|star systems]]. After being assigned to Bomis Koori IV [[Time/Legends|sometime]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederate]] [[General/Legends|General]] and Alliance member [[Oro Dassyne/Legends|Oro Dassyne]] increased the number of defensive weaponry throughout a [[Ray shield/Legends|ray shielded]] [[Oro Dassyne's Bomis Koori IV fort|fort]] that he maintained on the planet. In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], Dassyne himself believed that the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] would send an [[Army/Legends|army]] of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] to attack his fortified fort. Unbeknownst to Dassyne, a [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] of eight [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyers]], led by [[High Jedi General/Legends|High General]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], was dispatched by the Republic to capture Bomis Koori IV. Without betraying their presence to Dassyne's forces, Kenobi and Skywalker landed on the world, mounted on separate creatures, and headed for Dassyne's fort, while the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] themselves moved upon the fort from the planet's [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]]. ==The battle== {{Quote|I have a visual.''"
"''Jedi?''"
"''I think so.|A battle droid and Dassyne|audio=OroDassyne2-CW22.flac|}} [[File:CW_Chapter_22.png|thumb|left|240px|Skywalker and Kenobi on Bomis Koori IV]] Stationed in Dassyne's fort, a [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]] spotted Kenobi and Skywalker approaching the fort and alerted Dassyne, who was surprised to see only two [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]]. As the ''Venator''-class [[Star/Legends|Star]] [[Destroyer/Legends|Destroyers]] descended from the planet's atmosphere, a number of [[Aggressive ReConnaissance-170 starfighter/Legends|ARC-170 starfighters]] were deployed from the [[Cruiser/Legends|cruisers]] and began to fire on Dassyne's forces. After dismounting from their creatures, Kenobi and Skywalker made short work of [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droids]] with their [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]]. Despite Dassyne's belief that his fort could resist a takeover, Kenobi and Skywalker avoided the fort's defensive weaponry [[Battery/Legends|batteries]] and infiltrated the facility. Once inside, the Jedi disabled the structure's ray shield, rendering the fortress and all forces within vulnerable to an attack. The ARC-170s, as well as the Star Destroyers, directed their firepower at the crippled fort, which resulted in the [[Death/Legends|death]] of Dassyne. ==Behind the scenes== The battle of Bomis Koori IV first appeared in the [[Chapter 22 (Star Wars: Clone Wars)|twenty-second chapter]] of the ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'' television series, which aired on [[March 22]], [[2005]].{{IMDb|title/tt0859544|text="Star Wars: Clone Wars" Chapter 22 (TV episode 2005) - IMDb}} ==Appearances== *{{CW|22}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *''[[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *{{DB|character|generaldassyne|Dassyne, General Oro}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{OuterRimSiegesNav}} {{Interlang |de=Schlacht von Bomis Koori 4 (20 VSY)#legends |es=Batalla de Bomis Koori IV |nl=Battle of Bomis Koori IV |pl=Bitwa o Bomis Koori IV }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Bomis Koori IV, battle of}} [[Category:Battles of Bomis Koori IV]] [[Category:Battles of the Yag'Dhul theater]]
